title: T-072 — Nutrition computation Server Action + Nutri-Score grade (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-072 — Nutrition compute action

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action computeNutrition(formulationVersionId) → weighted-sum per-100g values across Reference.RawMaterials.nutrition_per_100g over formulation_ingredients, persists to nutrition_profiles, computes Nutri-Score grade A-E and writes nutri_score_results.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/domain/src/nutrition/compute-nutrition.ts: pure function computeNutrition(ingredients, rmNutrition) → 7-row per-100g + per-portion array.
2. packages/domain/src/nutrition/nutri-score.ts: pure function nutriScore(per100g) → grade A-E + numeric score per standard 2017 algorithm (negative + positive points).
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/nutrition/_actions/compute.ts: Server Action invoking both helpers + UPSERT into nutrition_profiles + nutri_score_results.
4. Vitest covers weighted-sum correctness, grade boundaries (A:≤-1, B:0-2, C:3-10, D:11-18, E:≥19) per Nutri-Score 2017 spec.

## Files
- packages/domain/src/nutrition/compute-nutrition.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/nutrition/nutri-score.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/nutrition/__tests__/compute-nutrition.test.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/nutrition/__tests__/nutri-score.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/nutrition/_actions/compute.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a formulation with 3 ingredients each 33.3% with known per-100g values, when computeNutrition runs, then per-100g energy = weighted sum within 0.01 tolerance per §17.11.2 weighted-sum spec
2. Given per-100g values producing Nutri-Score numeric=12, when nutriScore is called, then it returns grade='D' per Nutri-Score 2017 boundary 11-18
3. Given computeNutrition Server Action runs twice for the same version, when nutrition_profiles is queried, then exactly 7 rows exist (UPSERT, not duplicate INSERT)

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/compute-nutrition.test.ts (weighted sum) + __tests__/nutri-score.test.ts (grade boundaries) before functions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter domain test compute-nutrition nutri-score'

## Risk red lines
- Do not perform I/O in pure helper functions
- Do not use locale-dependent floating arithmetic (round explicitly)
- Do not duplicate rows (must UPSERT keyed by version_id + nutrient_code)
